zh.title: OpenAI 砸15亿建伙伴网络
zh.content: OpenAI 宣布推出合作伙伴网络，投入1.5亿美元帮助全球企业加速AI落地。这不是简单的渠道分销，而是深度绑定——从战略咨询到部署落地，OpenAI试图用生态联盟的方式抢占B端市场。对创业公司来说，能进这个网络等于拿到AI赛道的VIP门票。

en.title: OpenAI Launches $150M Partner Network
en.content: OpenAI just announced its Partner Network, investing $150M to help global enterprises accelerate AI adoption. This isn't just channel distribution—it's deep strategic partnerships covering consulting through deployment. For startups, getting into this network is like getting a VIP pass to the AI enterprise race.

zh.title: 英国16岁以下禁社交媒体
zh.content: 英国紧随澳大利亚，宣布禁止16岁以下青少年使用TikTok、Instagram等社交平台。这是全球监管收紧的最新信号——算法对青少年心理的影响，已经从学术讨论变成政策红线。但执行层面如何验证年龄？技术反制与绕过手段的猫鼠游戏，可能比禁令本身更值得关注。

en.title: UK Bans Social Media for Under-16s
en.content: The UK is following Australia's lead, banning under-16s from TikTok, Instagram, and other social platforms. This is the latest signal of global regulatory tightening—algorithmic impact on teen mental health has moved from academic debate to policy red lines. But the real challenge is age verification tech. The cat-and-mouse game between enforcement and circumvention may be more interesting than the ban itself.

zh.title: Mastra vs LangChain 实战对比
zh.content: 从生产环境实战角度对比两大AI Agent框架：Mastra的.dowhile()循环和类型化步骤设计在复杂流程中更优雅，但LangChain的生态和成熟度仍是优势。作者基于真实项目SupportMesh的踩坑经验，给出了选型建议——不是简单的哪个更好，而是看团队规模和场景复杂度。

en.title: Mastra vs LangChain: Production Showdown
en.content: A hands-on comparison from real production experience: Mastra's .dowhile() loops and typed step schemas shine in complex workflows, but LangChain's ecosystem and maturity remain strong advantages. The author, who built the multi-tenant SupportMesh platform on Mastra, gives practical advice—it's not about which is better, but which fits your team size and complexity needs.

zh.title: Anthropic Mythos 疑遭中方访问
zh.content: 据Semafor报道，白宫对Anthropic模型Mythos实施出口限制，部分原因竟是担心已被中国相关组织获取。如果属实，这意味着顶尖AI模型的安全边界正在瓦解——模型权重一旦被复制，传统的硬件制裁几乎失效。AI安全冷战的味道越来越浓了。

en.title: Anthropic's Mythos May Have Been Accessed by China
en.content: According to Semafor, White House export restrictions on Anthropic's Mythos were partly driven by fears that a China-linked group had already accessed it. If true, this means the security boundaries of top-tier AI models are collapsing—once model weights are copied, hardware sanctions become almost irrelevant. The AI security cold war is getting real.

zh.title: 苹果让旧iPhone再焕新生
zh.content: 苹果通过iOS底层优化，让iPhone 11等老机型也能更流畅、更持久。这不仅是技术优化，更是一种产品策略——延长设备生命周期，既讨好环保主义者，又减缓用户换机周期。当安卓阵营还在堆硬件，苹果已经开始在软件层面重新定义'性能'。

en.title: Apple Is Making Old iPhones Feel New Again
en.content: Apple is breathing new life into aging iPhones through iOS-level optimizations, making even the iPhone 11 feel snappier and last longer. This isn't just technical wizardry—it's a product strategy that extends device lifecycles, pleasing environmental advocates while slowing upgrade cycles. While Android keeps chasing hardware specs, Apple is redefining 'performance' through software.

zh.title: 红队AI基准测试加入伦理约束
zh.content: Red Team AI Benchmark v1.9.0 在MIT许可证下首次明确要求授权使用。这个改动很有深意：当安全测试工具本身可能被滥用时，开源社区的自我监管比法律约束更前置。这是AI安全工具从'能力展示'转向'负责任发布'的标志性事件。

en.title: Red Team AI Benchmark Adds Ethics Policy
en.content: Red Team AI Benchmark v1.9.0 now explicitly requires authorized use under its MIT license. This is significant: when security testing tools themselves can be weaponized, open-source community self-regulation becomes more proactive than legal constraints. It's a landmark moment for AI safety tools transitioning from 'capability demos' to 'responsible releases.'

zh.title: 2026建站：技术栈不重要
zh.content: 作者从实战角度提出：比起纠结React还是Vue，2026年建站更该关注内容策略、性能预算和用户体验。框架会过时，但好的内容架构和加载速度不会。这个观点有点反直觉——在AI辅助编程的时代，选择技术栈的决策权重正在下降。

en.title: Building Websites in 2026: Stack Matters Less
en.content: From the trenches: in 2026, content strategy, performance budgets, and UX matter more than whether you pick React or Vue. Frameworks come and go, but solid content architecture and loading speed don't. It's a counter-intuitive take—in an era of AI-assisted coding, the weight of tech stack decisions is actually decreasing.
